event: High Mass in an Andalusian Church
symbols: priest at the altar — the celebrant offering the Eucharistic sacrifice
golden retablo with statue — the sacred imagery framing the liturgical action
candles and candlesticks — the light of Christ illuminating the sanctuary
kneeling congregation — the faithful participating in the Mass
dark church interior with focused light — the mystery of divine presence in the sacrament
description: A dark church interior illuminated by candlelight, depicting a High Mass in an Andalusian church. At center-right, a priest in white vestments stands before a large gilded retablo (altarpiece) topped with a statue of a saint. Tall candlesticks with lit candles surround the altar, creating a warm golden glow. The congregation fills the lower portion of the scene — men, women, and children in various postures of prayer, some kneeling, some sitting on the floor. The church's stone arches and vaulted ceiling are visible in the shadowy upper portions.

_meta.title: High Mass in an Andalusian church
